subcodes.first_line: O ye who are steadfast in the Covenant! Through the light of the Covenant did the Incomparable Lord shed His radiance upon all horizons, and took such a pledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابتان بر پیمان حضرت بیچون بنور میثاق تجلی بر آفاق نمود و چنان عهدی گرفت
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @firmness in the Covenant, @the concourse on high
